title: Cryofloric Arts
description: This mod adds a series of items, gameplay mechanics, and creatures inspired by the Younger Dryas event.
body:
# Cryofloric Arts
Inspired by the "Younger Dryas event," this mod introduces a series of new mechanics, creatures, blocks, effects, and items.

## New Blocks and Items
The mod adds a flower that can rarely be found in cold regions: the Icepetal Dryadbloom. It can spread similarly to mushrooms. When brewed into suspicious stew, it grants the Frosted effect. In dark environments (light level less than 1), it transforms into a Snowfall Taro Plant. This plant grows like a crop but can only reach the third growth stage in low-light conditions (below light level 12). Full growth requires brighter light. Snowfall Taro has high saturation. When baked in a furnace, it becomes Rooted Snowfall Taro, which offers higher hunger restoration but lower saturation. Consuming it also grants the Frost Powder effect.

When Icepetal Dryadbloom is near water, it may grow aquatically as Aquatic Frigid Grass. This variant slows and freezes entities like powder snow and applies a brief Frost Powder effect.

The Frost Dust Detector can be crafted using four snowballs and one Icepetal Dryadbloom arranged like a compass. It detects the current chunk's Frost Dust level through texture changes.

The Snow Accumulation Detector is crafted with:

· Iron Ingot, [empty], Iron Ingot
· Snowball, Compass, Snowball
· Iron Ingot, Frost Dust Detector, Iron Ingot

It directly displays the current Frost Dust value in the chunk. Values above 10,000 cannot be displayed.

The Frostfall Trident functions similarly to a trident but leaves behind a cloud that applies Frosted and Frost Dust effects when thrown. Its attacks also inflict these effects on mobs.

The Bloated Snowfall Tuber emits very bright light and infects nearby blocks and entities. Infected blocks turn into powder snow, and affected entities gain the Frost Powder effect.

## New Effects

· Frosted: Periodically deals freezing damage based on the effect's level.
· Frost Powder: Causes an Icepetal Dryadbloom to spawn where an entity dies (or is killed). It also increases the effect level, duration, and Frost Dust value. At level 4 or higher, it applies the Over-Rooting effect (max level 10).
· Over-Rooting: Prevents affected entities from attacking each other. Periodically restores health equal to level × 5, extends the Frost Powder effect, and spawns a Bloated Snowfall Tuber upon death.

## New Mechanics
Frost Dust is a property carried by each infected chunk. When the value reaches 10,000, the biome will irreversibly transform into the White Barrens.

## New Biome
White Barrens:
This biome only spawns creatures composed of Icepetal Dryadbloom. It snows continuously, and grass and water appear gray.
 
## New Creature
Frostfall Bee: Native to the White Barrens, immune to powder snow, and regenerates health quickly. It actively attacks hostile entities with 20 HP or less and permanently has Frost Powder level 10 and Over-Rooting.
Blindfrost Beast:This mob spawns in theWhite Barrens biome. It searches for unlooted chests nearby and coats them with its slime. When a player opens such a chest, they will receive the Frosted effect at level 5 and the Frost Powder effect. When attacked,it will call upon nearby creatures affected by Over-Rooting to target the attacker, and inflict the Frosted effect at level 3 on all enemies in the area. Players under theOver-Rooting effect can offer it Rooted Snowfall Taro to obtain its slime, which can be used to coat containers to prevent theft.

The mod is still in development. Please report any bugs to the author.
